title: juncus krameri
intro: Juncus krameri, also known as Black Needle Rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). It is native to tropical Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Juncus krameri are typically dried and used as an infusion or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits.
